alerts.title: Apache Struts RCE on Payment Gateway
alerts.raw_log: Critical Alert: Unauthorized database access attempt via Apache Struts on port 8080 from IP 198.51.100.42. Exploit payload detected in Content-Type header indicating OGNL injection.
alerts.notes: HERO DEMO ALERT â€” the wow moment. Triggers Impact Agent to reveal Production Struts Gateway + 5M records in Payments Gateway segment.

alerts.title: Ransomware Signature on Backup Storage
alerts.raw_log: EDR Alert: Ransomware signature match â€” Conti variant hash 7f3a2e9b quarantined on FS-PROD-02. Suspicious file activity on port 9000 from internal host 10.0.0.40.
alerts.notes: Second CRITICAL demo. Triggers ransomware playbook (disconnect, preserve forensics, notify execs).

alerts.title: SQL Injection on Customer Payment Database
alerts.raw_log: High Alert: SQL injection attempt detected on port 3306 from IP 203.0.113.45. Malicious payload 'UNION SELECT' identified in /api/transactions endpoint targeting 10.0.0.20.
alerts.notes: HIGH severity demo. Triggers SQL injection playbook (WAF block, log review, input validation patch).

alerts.title: XSS Payload in HR Portal
alerts.raw_log: Medium Alert: Cross-site scripting (XSS) payload detected in Employee HR Portal input field on port 8444 from IP 192.0.2.100. Script tag injection attempted in profile bio.
alerts.notes: MEDIUM severity demo. Triggers XSS playbook (sanitize content, invalidate sessions, deploy CSP).

alerts.title: Port Scan on SSH Bastion
alerts.raw_log: Low Alert: Repeated SSH authentication failures from IP 45.146.10.0/24 on port 22. 240 failed root login attempts in 5 minutes. No successful authentication observed.
alerts.notes: LOW severity demo. Note: SSH port 22 not in asset inventory â€” pipeline will fall back to LOW playbook. Tests graceful degradation.
